summary: Tested Admin Credit Panel GST upsert feature and email rename (accounts@ → creditoperations@). All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Set Limit by GST button visible, modal opens correctly, GST lookup works for both new and existing customers, Replace/Top-up toggle functional, credit search filters by GSTIN.
seed_data_creation: Created test wallets during backend tests with GSTINs: 27TEST*, 27REPL*, 27TOPU*, 27PERD*, 27BALC*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit wallet GST upsert feature fully tested. Key flows verified: (1) GET /api/orders/credit/wallets/lookup returns {found: false} for unknown GSTIN, {found: true, wallet: {...}} for existing, 400 for invalid length. (2) POST /api/orders/credit/wallets/upsert requires password='0905', validates GSTIN length=15 and credit_limit≥0, creates new wallet (created=true), replace mode overwrites limit+balance, topup mode adds to existing, credit_period_days defaults to 30 if not in {30,60,90}. (3) Credit-ops admin login works with new email creditoperations@locofast.com, old email accounts@locofast.com correctly rejected. (4) All email references updated from accounts@ to creditoperations@ in payouts_router.py, email_router.py, brand_router.py, orders_router.py. (5) Frontend: Set Limit by GST button visible, modal opens with data-testid='set-credit-by-gst-modal', GST input strips spaces and uppercases, 15-char GSTIN triggers lookup, new customer amber card appears for unknown GSTIN, existing customer blue card shows company/email/limit/balance/used/period with Replace/Top-up toggle, credit search filters by GSTIN.

lookup_endpoint.details: GET /api/orders/credit/wallets/lookup returns correct response for valid/invalid/existing GSTINs

upsert_endpoint.details: POST /api/orders/credit/wallets/upsert creates new wallets, updates existing with replace/topup modes

password_gate.details: Upsert endpoint requires password='0905', rejects wrong password with 403

validation.details: GSTIN length=15 validated, credit_limit≥0 validated, credit_period_days defaults to 30

creditops_login.details: creditoperations@locofast.com / Accounts@123 login works, old accounts@ email rejected

email_references.details: All references to accounts@locofast.com replaced with creditoperations@locofast.com

frontend_button.details: Set Limit by GST button visible with data-testid='set-credit-by-gst-btn'

frontend_modal.details: Modal opens with data-testid='set-credit-by-gst-modal', GST input works

frontend_lookup_new.details: New customer amber card (data-testid='set-credit-new-card') appears for unknown GSTIN

frontend_lookup_existing.details: Existing customer blue card (data-testid='set-credit-existing-card') shows wallet details

frontend_gst_search.details: Credit search input (data-testid='credit-search') filters by GSTIN

wallet_persistence.details: After upsert, wallet appears in GET /api/orders/credit/wallets and lookup endpoint
